title: Tala 3 Tier Non-Stick Cooling Rack - Space Saving Collapsible Oven Racks - Cake Cooling Rack for Baking Freshly Baked Muffins, Cookies & Biscuits - Baking Tools & Accessories, 40 x 25cm, Black
features: 3 TIER COOLING RACK: The ultimate baking tools for perfect larger batch baking! The Tala 3 tier cooling rack has a grid design that allows air through each layer, cooling freshly baked food naturally. Ideal for keeping cakes, muffins and biscuits raised off the countertop while they cool

FOR FLAWLESS BAKING: The stainless steel baking trays elevate your baked treats allowing steam to evaporate from all levels. The space-saving racks are reusable making them ideal for everyday baking. Simply collapse, wash and store safely until the next use

HOW TO USE: Stack the three individual cooling racks for baking to have multiple levels of cooling. Cover each tray with grease-proof paper to avoid damage when cooling fragile cakes. The result? Perfectly baked goods with crisp undersides. Dishwasher safe

NON-STICK: Trustworthy baking accessories that are entirely food safe. Each wire cooling rack has a non-stick coating to avoid your freshly baked goods from sticking. The spaces between the squares are small enough so your cake wonâ€t fall between the spaces

MASTERS OF BAKING: The Tala Everyday collection includes a diverse range of kitchen gadgets, utensils, bakeware and household products - perfect for everyday cooking and baking. Established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality kitchenware, bakeware and cookware
